_README: Approved Choccy Chat friends shown on /choccy-chat. Add a new entry by appending to the `entries` array below, then commit + deploy. Geocode city -> lat/lng using https://www.openstreetmap.org/search (copy the centre coordinate). Use 4-decimal precision. The id should be a kebab-case slug, unique across the file.

entries.name: L'Artisan Chocolates
entries.blurb: Hand-crafted bonbons from a small workshop in Frederiksoord. Developer of choc-collab, an open source app for small scale artisan chocolatiers.
